title: Semiquincentennial Congressional Time Capsule Act
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration.
crs_summary: Semiquincentennial Congressional Time Capsule Act This bill requires the Architect of the Capitol to create a congressional time capsule in honor of the 250 th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence to be buried on the west lawn of the Capitol on or before July 4, 2026. Congressional leadership will determine the contents of the time capsule, and the time capsule shall be sealed until July 4, 2276.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration.
